gitList.authorColorsCleared: Saved author icon colors cleared. Expand Commits again to reassign.
gitList.createBranchPickCommit: Right-click a commit in the list.
gitList.noGitRepo: No Git repository found for this workspace.
gitList.createBranchInputPrompt: Branch name (default is the short commit hash). Press Enter to create and check out.
gitList.stashActionPick: Right-click a stash entry in the list.
gitList.dropStashConfirmIntro: Permanently drop this stash? This cannot be undone.
gitList.deleteBranchPick: Right-click a branch in the Branches list.
gitList.deleteBranchConfirmIntro: Delete local branch “{0}”? This runs: git branch -d
gitList.deleteOldBranchesConfirm: Delete {0} local branch(es) whose tip commit is older than 6 months? The current branch is never removed. Each branch is deleted with git branch -d; unmerged branches will be skipped and listed afterward.
gitList.deleteOldBranchesNone: No local branches match (tip commit older than 6 months, excluding the current branch).
gitList.deleteOldBranchesPartial: Deleted {0} branch(es). {1} could not be deleted (e.g. not merged): {2}
gitList.branchesMoreDeleteOldTitle: Delete local branches older than 6 months
gitList.branchesMoreDeleteOldDescription: Tip commit older than 6 months; git branch -d each
gitList.branchNotMergedIntoHead: Not fully merged into the current HEAD.
gitList.stashListReadFailed: Failed to read git stash list.
gitList.deleteBranchRemoteNotSupported: Delete applies to local branches only. Switch to the branch list under Branches, or delete the remote on the server.
gitList.checkoutBranchPick: Right-click a branch row under Branches or Remotes.
gitList.mergeBranchPick: Right-click a branch that is not fully merged (red branch icon).
gitList.mergeBranchDetachedHead: Cannot merge while in detached HEAD. Check out a branch first.
gitList.mergeBranchSameAsHead: Already on “{0}”; nothing to merge from the same branch.
gitList.mergeBranchConfirmIntro: Merge “{0}” into the current branch “{1}”? This runs: git merge {0}
gitList.repoStatusOpened: Full output is in Output → Git List.
gitList.repoStateMergeInProgress: [State] Merge in progress (MERGE_HEAD). Use “Abort merge” if you want to cancel.
gitList.repoStateRebaseInProgress: [State] Rebase in progress (REBASE_HEAD). Use “Abort rebase” if you want to cancel.
gitList.abortMergeConfirmIntro: Abort the current merge? Working tree changes from the merge will be undone (git merge --abort).
gitList.branchesMoreGitStatusDesc: git status in Output — use when the status bar shows a warning
gitList.fileHistoryOpenFileHint: Open a saved file in the editor to see commits that touched it.
gitList.fileHistoryNotInRepo: Active file is not inside a Git repository.
gitList.openWorkingTreeFailed: Could not open the working tree file (missing or not on disk).
gitList.openWorkingTreeNoGitListDoc: No Git List diff pane with a file path is visible. Open a diff from Git List first.
gitList.cursorLineGitHintHoverUncommitte: This line is not yet committed (working tree or index).
gitList.cursorLineGitHintPreviewDiff: Preview this file’s diff in this commit
gitList.cursorLineOpenCommitDiffFailed: Could not open the commit diff for this file.
gitList.stashAllUntrackedPrompt: Optional stash description (git stash push -u -m …). Leave empty to let Git choose the message.
gitList.commitListFilterParticipantsDesc: Only commits by checked authors appear; others stay out until you include them here. All checked = clear filter.
gitList.commitListMoreUnavailable: Open a repo file for File History first, or select Commits / a branch row.
gitList.participantFilterExpandFirst: Expand this list once so commits load, then open participant filter again.
gitList.participantFilterPickTitle: Include authors — list shows only their commits
gitList.participantFilterPickPlaceholder: Only authors already seen in this list appear. Unchecked = excluded. Check all to clear filter. After OK, reload from page one.
gitList.participantFilterPageEmpty: (No commits by included authors in this batch — try Load more or change the filter.)
